info.title: Microsoft IoT Models Repository CommandLine
info.description: Command line for the Azure IoT Models Repository

commands.name: expand
commands.description: For each model in a local repository, generate expanded model files and insert them in-place. The expanded version of a model includes the model with its full model dependency chain.

options.name: --local-repo
options.description: Local models repository path. If no path is provided the current working directory is used. [default: ]

options.name: --debug
options.description: Shows additional logs for debugging. [default: False]

options.name: --silent
options.description: Silences command output on standard out. [default: False]

options.name: --help
options.description: Show help and usage information

commands.name: export
commands.description: Exports a model producing the model and its dependency chain in an expanded format. The target repository is used for model resolution.

options.name: --dtmi
options.description: Digital Twin Model Identifier. Example: "dtmi:com:example:Thermostat;1".

options.name: --model-file
options.description: Path to file containing Digital Twins model content.

options.name: --repo
options.description: Models repository location. Supports remote endpoint or local directory. [default: https://devicemodels.azure.com/]

options.name: --output-file
options.description: Desired file path to write result contents. [default: ]

options.name: --debug
options.description: Shows additional logs for debugging. [default: False]

options.name: --silent
options.description: Silences command output on standard out. [default: False]

options.name: --help
options.description: Show help and usage information

commands.name: import
commands.description: Imports models from a model file into the local repository. The local repository is used for model resolution. Target model files for import will first be validated to ensure adherence to IoT Models Repository conventions.

options.name: --model-file
options.description: Path to file containing Digital Twins model content.

options.name: --directory
options.description: Path to directory containing Digital Twins model content.

options.name: --search-pattern
options.description: The search string to match against the names of files in directory path. This parameter can contain a combination of valid literal path and wildcard (* and ?) characters, but it doesn't support regular expressions. [default: *.json]

options.name: --local-repo
options.description: Local models repository path. If no path is provided the current working directory is used. [default: ]

options.name: --force
options.description: Forces import operation to override existing model file. [default: False]

options.name: --max-dtdl-version
options.description: Sets the maximum DTDL version accepted. [default: 2]

options.name: --debug
options.description: Shows additional logs for debugging. [default: False]

options.name: --silent
options.description: Silences command output on standard out. [default: False]

options.name: --help
options.description: Show help and usage information

commands.name: index
commands.description: Builds a model index file from the state of a target local models repository.

options.name: --local-repo
options.description: Local models repository path. If no path is provided the current working directory is used. [default: ]

options.name: --output-file
options.description: File path to write root model index content. Index pages will be placed relative to this path. [default: index.json]

options.name: --page-limit
options.description: Maximum models per page. [default: 2048]

options.name: --debug
options.description: Shows additional logs for debugging. [default: False]

options.name: --silent
options.description: Silences command output on standard out. [default: False]

options.name: --help
options.description: Show help and usage information

commands.name: validate
commands.description: Validates the DTDL model contained in a file. When validating a single model object the target repository is used for model resolution. When validating an array of models only the array contents is used for resolution.

options.name: --model-file
options.description: Path to file containing Digital Twins model content.

options.name: --directory
options.description: Path to directory containing Digital Twins model content.

options.name: --search-pattern
options.description: The search string to match against the names of files in directory path. This parameter can contain a combination of valid literal path and wildcard (* and ?) characters, but it doesn't support regular expressions. [default: *.json]

options.name: --repo
options.description: Models repository location. Supports remote endpoint or local directory. [default: https://devicemodels.azure.com/]

options.name: --strict
options.description: Runs additional verifications for a model including file paths and DTMI scoping. [default: False]

options.name: --max-dtdl-version
options.description: Sets the maximum DTDL version accepted. [default: 2]

options.name: --debug
options.description: Shows additional logs for debugging. [default: False]

options.name: --silent
options.description: Silences command output on standard out. [default: False]

options.name: --help
options.description: Show help and usage information

options.name: --debug
options.description: Shows additional logs for debugging. [default: False]

options.name: --silent
options.description: Silences command output on standard out. [default: False]

options.name: --version
options.description: Show version information

options.name: --help
options.description: Show help and usage information
